descs.desc: [EndSkill] Gain 1 Haste, 1 Wrath Power Up, and 1 Blunt Power Up next turn

2050411.name: Untempered Agitation
2050411.desc: At the start of the combat phase, if targeted by 2 or more skills, this unit’s skills have +1 Base Power; when hit, inflict 1 Burn on the attacker. (5 times per turn.)
